title: Squash, Marmite & Chicken Spaghetti
summary: Creamy squash, golden chicken mince and of course marmite for that perfect savoury finish. A bowl of comfort that still smashes your protein goals.

method.description: Heat the oven to 200°C. Peel the squash, if you like, and chop into 3cm chunks. Tip onto a roasting tray with a drizzle of Olive Oil, season with salt and pepper, and toss to coat. Add the unpeeled garlic cloves to the tray and roast for 25–30 mins, until soft and caramelised.

Let the squash cool slightly. Squeeze the roasted garlic out of their skins and add to a blender along with the squash, cottage cheese, grated Cheddar, Marmite and the juice of the lemon. Season with salt and pepper and blend until smooth, loosening with a splash of pasta water or boiling water if needed.
Bring a large pan of salted water to the boil. Cook the pasta following pack instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a large frying pan over a medium heat. Add the chicken mince, season well, and cook for 7–10 mins, stirring, until golden brown and cooked through.

Tip the cooked pasta into the pan with the mince. Pour over the sauce and stir to combine. Reheat gently over a low heat, loosening with a splash of water if needed. Taste and adjust the seasoning with more salt, pepper or lemon juice.
Divide between bowls and finish with a grating of Parmesan and a pinch of chilli flakes.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
